goal: 补齐 fork contributor publish UX

summary.title: 补齐 fork contributor publish UX
summary.what: 在现有 mainline publish 上增加 --remote 覆盖，让 fork contributor 可以把自己的 actor log 推到可写 fork remote；非 team remote publish 不把 intent 标成 proposed。seal auto-publish 失败时给出 agent 可执行的 fork PR 下一步：publish 到 fork remote，并用 pr-description 生成 upstream PR body。
summary.why: #184 的剩余缺口不是再造一套导入实体，而是 contributor 没有 upstream refs 写权限时缺少一个克制的一等 publish 路径。maintainer 侧 actor import 已能从 fork 接收 actor log；contributor 侧需要能把同一 actor log 放到 fork remote，且不能让本地状态误以为已经 team-visible。
summary.user_goal: 补齐 fork contributor publish UX

decisions.point: fork contributor metadata publish 入口
decisions.chose: 复用现有 mainline publish，增加 --remote <fork> 覆盖。
decisions.rationale: 这保持 Mainline 工具属性：publish 仍然只是 actor-log metadata publish，不混入代码 branch push、PR 创建或新 workflow 实体。
rejected: 新增 export bundle 或 fork workflow 实体，因为当前需求只需要把 actor log 推到 contributor 已配置的 fork remote。
从 PR body/comment 导入 sealed intent，因为这会模糊 author-sealed actor log 与 inferred PR metadata 的信任边界。

decisions.point: publish 到非 team remote 后的本地状态
decisions.chose: 保持 sealed_local，并在 PublishResult.Warning 中说明已推到 non-team remote。
decisions.rationale: fork remote publish 只是让 maintainer 有来源可 import，不代表 upstream team view 已经可见；只有 configured Mainline remote publish 成功才提升为 proposed。

decisions.chose: seal auto-publish 失败 warning 直接给出 mainline publish --intent <id> --remote <fork> 和 mainline pr-description --intent <id>。
decisions.rationale: agent 在权限失败时需要下一步可执行命令，而不是抽象解释。

review_notes: 本层是 int_c9ea08de/int_bc76642b 之后的 contributor-side publish UX，不改变 actor import trust model。
保持克制：没有新增持久实体，没有新增 PR body import 机制，没有让 publish 触发代码 branch push 或 PR 创建。

已运行：go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestPublish|TestSealSubmitPublishFailureSuggestsForkRemote|TestSealSubmitOfflineSkipsSyncAndCheck|TestAgent|TestImportActorLog' -count=1；go test ./internal/cli -run 'TestPublishCommandHasForkRemoteFlag|TestActorImportCommandIsRegistered|TestSignalCommandsUsePluralQueues' -count=1；go test ./internal/cli -count=1；go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestPublish|TestSealSubmit|TestImportActorLog|TestPin|TestReconcile|TestBackfill|TestCoverage' -count=1；git diff --check。

architectural_claims: mainline publish remains a metadata-only tool; --remote only changes which configured Git remote receives the actor log.
Publishing to a fork remote does not make the intent team-visible; upstream visibility still requires maintainer import or team remote publish.
behavioral_changes: mainline publish accepts --remote <name> and passes it to Service.Publish.
Service.Publish pushes actor-log refs to the selected remote while only marking sealed_local intents proposed when the selected remote is the configured team remote.
Seal submit publish failures now include fork PR recovery commands for agents.
security_implications: Fork remote publish does not bypass upstream trust: contributor metadata remains sealed_local locally until the maintainer explicitly imports it or team remote publish succeeds.
The change does not grant or assume upstream refs write access.
migration_notes: No migration required; existing publish callers continue using the default configured remote.
